pipelines.name: reid_{{CAMERA_NAME}}
pipelines.pipeline: rtspsrc location=rtsp://mediaserver:8554/lp-camera1 latency=100 protocols=tcp ! rtph264depay ! h264parse ! vah264dec ! videorate ! video/x-raw(memory:VAMemory),framerate=25/1 ! queue max-size-buffers=1 leaky=downstream ! gvapython class=PostDecodeTimestampCapture function=processFrame module=/home/pipeline-server/user_scripts/gvapython/sscape/sscape_adapter.py name=timesync ! gvadetect scheduling-policy=latency inference-interval=2 nireq=4 model=/home/pipeline-server/models/detect/person-detection-retail-0013/person-detection-retail-0013.xml model-proc=/home/pipeline-server/models/detect/person-detection-retail-0013/person-detection-retail-0013.json name=detection device=GPU pre-process-backend=va-surface-sharing ! gvainference nireq=4 model=/home/pipeline-server/models/reid/person-reidentification-retail-0277/person-reidentification-retail-0277.xml inference-region=roi-list device=GPU pre-process-backend=va-surface-sharing ! gvametaconvert add-tensor-data=true name=metaconvert ! gvapython class=PostInferenceDataPublish function=processFrame module=/home/pipeline-server/user_scripts/gvapython/sscape/sscape_adapter.py name=datapublisher ! gvametapublish name=destination ! appsink sync=true
